item.title: RSA入门
item.description:
<link rel="stylesheet" class="aplayer-secondary-style-marker" href="\assets\css\APlayer.min.css"><script src="\assets\js\APlayer.min.js" class="aplayer-secondary-script-marker"></script><h1><a href="https://github.com/ctf-wiki/ctf-wiki/blob/master/docs/zh/docs/crypto/asymmetric/rsa/rsa_theory.md#rsa-%E4%BB%8B%E7%BB%8D">RSA入门</a></h1> <h2 id="01-介绍：">01.介绍：</h2> <p>RSA 加密算法是一种非对称加密算法。在公开密钥加密和电子商业中 RSA 被广泛使用。RSA 是 1977 年由罗纳德·李维斯特（Ron Rivest）、阿迪·萨莫尔（Adi Shamir）和伦纳德·阿德曼（Leonard Adleman）一起提出的。RSA 就是他们三人姓氏开头字母拼在一起组成的。</p> <span id="more"></span> <p>RSA 算法的可靠性由极大整数因数分解的难度决定。换言之，对一极大整数做因数分解愈困难，RSA 算法愈可靠。假如有人找到一种快速因数分解的算法的话，那么用 RSA 加密的信息的可靠性就肯定会极度下降。但找到这样的算法的可能性是非常小的。如今，只有短的 RSA 密钥才可能被强力方式解破。到 2017 年为止，还没有任何可靠的攻击 RSA 算法的方式。</p> <h2 id="02-RSA算法简介">02.RSA算法简介</h2> <h3 id="公钥与私钥的产生："><strong>公钥与私钥的产生：</strong></h3> <p>(1)进行加密之前，首先随机找出2个不同的大质数p和q,计算 $N = p \times q$</p> <p>(2)根据欧拉函数,求得求得 $\varphi(N) = \varphi§\varphi(q) = (p - 1)(q - 1)$</p> <p>(3)找出一个公钥e，e要满足: 1&lt;e&lt;φ(n) 的整数，且使e和φ(N)互质。</p> <p>(4)根据e*d除以φ(n)余数为1，找到私钥d。求得 $e$ 关于 $\varphi(N)$ 的模反元素，命名为 $d$(逆元) ，有 $ed \equiv 1(mod\varphi(N))$</p> <p>(5) 将 $p$ 和 $q$ 的记录销毁</p> <p>(6)所以,$(N,e)$ 是公钥，$(N,d)$ 是私钥。</p> <h3 id="消息加密"><strong>消息加密:</strong></h3> <p>首先需要将消息以一个双方约定好的格式转化为一个小于 $\mathbf{N}$ ，且与 $\mathbf{N}$ 互质的整数 $\mathbf{m}_{\mathbf{\circ}}$ 如果消息太长，可以将消息分为几段，这也就是我们所说的块加密，后对于每一部分利用如下公式加密:</p> <p>$$<br> m^{e} \equiv c\ ;(modN)<br> $$</p> <h3 id="消息解密"><strong>消息解密:</strong></h3> <p>利用密钥 $d$ 进行解密。</p> <p>$$<br> c^{d} \equiv m\ (modN)<br> $$</p> <pre><code>p 和 q ：大整数N的两个因子（factor）
N：大整数N，我们称之为模数（modulus
e 和 d：互为模反数的两个指数（exponent）
c 和 m：分别是密文和明文，这里一般指的是一个十进制的数 </code></pre> <h2 id="03-RSA算法原理">03.RSA算法原理</h2> <h3 id="欧拉函数-varphi-N">欧拉函数 $\varphi(N) $</h3> <p>定义：小于N的自然数中与N互质的数的个数</p> <pre><code>任何一个素数p的欧拉函数就是p-1
n的欧拉函数 phi = (p-1)(q-1) </code></pre> <h3 id="欧拉定理">欧拉定理</h3> <p>若n，a为正整数，且n，a互质，即 gcd ( n , a )=1 则：<br> $$<br> a^{\varphi(N)} \equiv 1;(mod;n)<br> $$</p> <p>$$<br> 即:a^{\varphi(N)}=1+kn ;;;(k为任意整数)<br> $$</p> <h3 id="费马小定理">费马小定理</h3> <p>费马小定理：</p> <pre><code>若p是质数，a与p互质，
a^p </code></pre> <p>$$<br> a^p\equiv a;(mod;p)<br> $$</p> <p>$$<br> 即:a^p=a+kp<br> $$</p> <p>$$<br> 或:a^{;p-1}\equiv1;(mod;p)<br> $$</p> <p>$$<br> 即:a^{p-1}=1+kp<br> $$</p> <h3 id="模运算">模运算</h3> <pre><code>(a + b) % p = (a % p + b % p) % p (a - b) % p = (a % p - b % p) % p (a * b) % p = (a % p * b % p) % p a ^ b % p = ((a % p) ^ b) % p 结合律 ((a + b) % p + c) = (a + (b + c) % p) % p ((a * b) % p * c) = (a * (b * c) % p) % p 交换律 (a + b) % p = (b + a) % p (a * b) % p = (b * a) % p 分配律 (a + b) % p = (a % p + b % p) % p ((a + b) % p * c) % p = ((a * c) % p + (b * c) % p 重要定理 若 a ≡ b (mod p)，则对于任意的 c，都有(a + c) ≡ (b + c) (mod p) 若 a ≡ b (mod p)，则对于任意的 c，都有(a * c) ≡ (b * c) (mod p) 若 a ≡ b (mod p)，c ≡ d (mod p)，则 (a + c) ≡ (b + d) (mod p) (a - c) ≡ (b - d) (mod p) (a * c) ≡ (b * d) (mod p) (a / c) ≡ (b / d) (mod p) </code></pre> <pre><code>逆元 a mod p的逆元便是可以使 a * a' mod p = 1 的最小a'。 </code></pre> <h3 id="RSA算法正确性的推导">RSA算法正确性的推导</h3> <pre><code>式1：c=m^e%N 式2：m=c^d%N
将式1带入式2 得 m = (m ^ e % N ) ^ d % N
需要证明：m == ( m ^ e % N ) ^ d % N
(m^e%N)^d%N
=&gt; (m^e)^d%N #模运算 a ^ b % p = ((a % p) ^ b) % p
m^(e*d)%N #幂的乘方，底数不变，指数相乘 将 e * d ≡ 1 (mod φ(N)) 即 e * d = K * φ(N) + 1，K为任意正整数，代入得：
=&gt; (m^(K*φ(N)+1))%N
=&gt; (m^(K*φ(N)*m^1)%N # 同底数相乘，指数相加
=&gt; (m^(K*φ(N)*m)%N
=&gt; ((m^φ(N)^K%N*m)%N # 幂的乘方，底数不变，指数相乘
=&gt; ((m^φ(N)^K%N*m%N)%N # (a * b) % p = (a % p * b % p) % p
=&gt; ((m^φ(N)%N)^K%N*m%N)%N # a ^ b % p = ((a % p) ^ b) % p
=&gt; (1^K%N*m%N)%N # 根据欧拉定理：a^φ(n)≡1 mod n 即 a^φ(n) mod n = 1
=&gt; (m%N)%N # 1^K%N=1
=&gt; (m%N)%N
=&gt; (m%N)^1%N
=&gt; (m^1)%N # a ^ b % p = ((a % p) ^ b) % p
=&gt; m%N
m #因为 m &lt; N </code></pre> <h2 id="04-随机生成flag">04.随机生成flag</h2> <pre class=" language-language-python"><code class="language-language-python">import random import hashlib import string
#字符串列表 a=string.printable #随机生成flag for i in range(10): flag = "" for i in range(10): flag += a[random.randint(0, 99)] flag = hashlib.md5(flag.encode()).hexdigest() print("flag&#123;" + flag + "&#125;")
from uuid import uuid1 flag="flag&#123;"+str(uuid1())+"&#125;" print(flag) </code></pre> <p><img src="https://i0.hdslb.com/bfs/article/6bb7113e6f3e65e1f762f2565539c32563b340c1.png@902w_209h_progressive.webp" alt="img"></p> <h2 id="05-一般出题脚本">05.一般出题脚本</h2> <pre class=" language-language-python"><code class="language-language-python">import libnum
from Crypto.Util.number import * #生成随机素数 getPrime()
p=libnum.generate_prime(1024) q=libnum.generate_prime(1024) e=65537 m="flag&#123;20d6e2da95dcc1fa5f5432a436c4be18&#125;" #字符串转数字 m=libnum.s2n(m) m=bytes_to_long(m)
n=p*q phi_n=(p-1)*(q-1) #求逆元 d=libnum.invmod(e,phi_n) d=inverse() c=pow(m,e,n)
print("p=",p) print("q=",q) print ("n=",n) print("d=",d) print ("e=",e) print ("c=",c) </code></pre> <h2 id="06-题型总结">06.题型总结</h2> <h3 id="已知n-d-e-c求m">已知n,d,e,c求m</h3> <pre class=" language-language-python"><code class="language-language-python">import libnum
n=  d=  e= 65537 c= 
m=pow(c, d, n) print(libnum.n2s(m).decode() </code></pre> <h3 id="已知p-q-e-c求m">已知p,q,e,c求m</h3> <pre class=" language-language-python"><code class="language-language-python">import libnum
p=  q=  e= 65537 c= 
n=p*q phi_n=(p-1)*(q-1)
#求逆元 d=libnum.invmod(e,phi_n)
m=pow(c,d,n) print(m) #数字转字节，转字符串 print(libnum.n2s(int(m)).decode() </code></pre> <h3 id="基于N分解的RSA题目">基于N分解的RSA题目</h3> <h4 id="1-在线查询分解网站">1.在线查询分解网站</h4> <p><a href="http://www.factordb.com/index.php">http://www.factordb.com/index.php</a></p> <h4 id="2-使用yafu工具分解">2.使用yafu工具分解</h4> <p>下载地址：<a href="https://sourceforge.net/projects/yafu/">https://sourceforge.net/projects/yafu/</a></p> <pre><code>#以分解49为例 yafu-x64.exe factor(49)
#导入文件进行分解，主要注意文本结尾要换行！！！不然要报错 yafu-x64.exe &quot;factor(@)&quot; -batchfile 1.txt </code></pre> <h4 id="3-使用费马分解">3.使用费马分解</h4> <p>网上找的脚本，p和q太接近</p> <pre class=" language-language-python"><code class="language-language-python">def isqrt(n): x = n y = (x + n // x) // 2 while y < x: x = y y = (x + n // x) // 2 return x
def fermat(n, verbose=True): a = isqrt(n) # int(ceil(n**0.5)) b2 = a*a - n b = isqrt(n) # int(b2**0.5) count = 0 while b*b != b2: # if verbose: # print('Trying: a=%s b2=%s b=%s' % (a, b2, b)) a = a + 1 b2 = a*a - n b = isqrt(b2) # int(b2**0.5) count += 1 p=a+b q=a-b assert n == p * q # print('a=',a) # print('b=',b) # print('p=',p) # print('q=',q) # print('pq=',p*q) return p, q fermat(n) </code></pre> <h4 id="4-分解出来后，用脚本解密即可">4.分解出来后，用脚本解密即可</h4> <pre><code>import gmpy2 import libnum
p= q= e= c=
n=p*q phi_n=(p-1)*(q-1)
#求逆元 #d=libnum.invmod(e,phi_n) d=gmpy2.invert(e,phi_n)
m=pow(c,d,n) print(m) print(libnum.n2s(int(m)).decode()) </code></pre> <h4 id="出题脚本">出题脚本</h4> <pre><code>p,q接近，很快就能分解 import libnum import gmpy2
p=libnum.generate_prime(1024) #下一个素数 q=gmpy2.next_prime(p) print(p) print(q) print(gmpy2.is_prime(q)) e=65537 m=&quot;flag&#123;20d6e2da95dcc1fa5f5432a436c4be18&#125;&quot; m=libnum.s2n(m) n=p*q phi_n=(p-1)*(q-1) d=libnum.invmod(e,phi_n) c=pow(m,e,n)
print(&quot;n=&quot;,n) print (&quot;e=&quot;,e) print (&quot;c=&quot;,c) </code></pre> <h4 id="解题脚本">解题脚本</h4> <pre class=" language-language-python"><code class="language-language-python">import gmpy2 import libnum
def isqrt(n): x = n y = (x + n // x) // 2 while y < x: x = y y = (x + n // x) // 2 return x
def fermat(n, verbose=True): a = isqrt(n) # int(ceil(n**0.5)) b2 = a*a - n b = isqrt(n) # int(b2**0.5) count = 0 while b*b != b2: # if verbose: # print('Trying: a=%s b2=%s b=%s' % (a, b2, b)) a = a + 1 b2 = a*a - n b = isqrt(b2) # int(b2**0.5) count += 1 p=a+b q=a-b assert n == p * q # print('a=',a) # print('b=',b) print('p=',p) print('q=',q) # print('pq=',p*q) return p, q n=  e= 65537 c=  pq=fermat(n) p=pq[0] q=pq[1] phi_n=(p-1)*(q-1) #求逆元 #d=libnum.invmod(e,phi_n) d=gmpy2.invert(e,phi_n) m=pow(c,d,n) print(m) print(libnum.n2s(int(m)).decode()) </code></pre> <h3 id="RSA密钥生成与读取">RSA密钥生成与读取</h3> <p><strong>安装pycryptodome模块</strong></p> <h4 id="公钥生成">公钥生成</h4> <pre class=" language-language-python"><code class="language-language-python">from Crypto.PublicKey import RSA
p= 787228223375328491232514653709 q= 814212346998672554509751911073 n= 640970939378021470187479083920100737340912672709639557619757 d= 590103645243332826117029128695341159496883001869370080307201 e= 65537
rsa_components = (n, e) keypair = RSA.construct(rsa_components) with open('pubckey.pem', 'wb') as f : f.write(keypair.exportKey()) </code></pre> <h4 id="私钥生成">私钥生成</h4> <pre class=" language-language-python"><code class="language-language-python">from Crypto.PublicKey import RSA
p= 787228223375328491232514653709 q= 814212346998672554509751911073 n= 640970939378021470187479083920100737340912672709639557619757 d= 590103645243332826117029128695341159496883001869370080307201 e= 65537
rsa_components = (n,e,d,p,q) keypair = RSA.construct(rsa_components) with open('private1.pem', 'wb') as f : f.write(keypair.exportKey()) </code></pre> <h4 id="公钥读取">公钥读取</h4> <pre class=" language-language-python"><code class="language-language-python">from Crypto.PublicKey import RSA with open("pubckey.pem","rb") as f: key = RSA.import_key(f.read()) print('n = %d' % key.n) print('e = %d' % key.e) </code></pre> <h4 id="私钥读取">私钥读取</h4> <pre class=" language-language-python"><code class="language-language-python">from Crypto.PublicKey import RSA with open("private1.pem","rb") as f: key = RSA.import_key(f.read()) print('n = %d' % key.n) print('e = %d' % key.e) print('d = %d' % key.d) print('p = %d' % key.p) print('q = %d' % key.q) </code></pre> <h4 id="出题脚本-基于N分解的题目">出题脚本 -基于N分解的题目</h4> <pre class=" language-language-python"><code class="language-language-python">import libnum import gmpy2 from Crypto.PublicKey import RSA
p=libnum.generate_prime(1024) #下一个素数 q=int(gmpy2.next_prime(p)) e=65537 m="flag&#123;a272722c1db834353ea3ce1d9c71feca&#125;" m=libnum.s2n(m) n=p*q c=pow(m,e,n) flag_c=libnum.n2s(c) rsa_components = (n, e) keypair = RSA.construct(rsa_components) with open('pubckey1.pem', 'wb') as f : f.write(keypair.exportKey()) with open("flag.txt","wb") as f: f.write(flag_c) </code></pre> <h4 id="解题脚本-2">解题脚本</h4> <pre class=" language-language-python"><code class="language-language-python">import libnum import gmpy2 from Crypto.PublicKey import RSA
def isqrt(n): x = n y = (x + n // x) // 2 while y < x: x = y y = (x + n // x) // 2 return x
def fermat(n, verbose=True): a = isqrt(n) # int(ceil(n**0.5)) b2 = a*a - n b = isqrt(n) # int(b2**0.5) count = 0 while b*b != b2: # if verbose: # print('Trying: a=%s b2=%s b=%s' % (a, b2, b)) a = a + 1 b2 = a*a - n b = isqrt(b2) # int(b2**0.5) count += 1 p=a+b q=a-b assert n == p * q # print('a=',a) # print('b=',b) # print('p=',p) # print('q=',q) # print('pq=',p*q) return p, q
with open("pubckey1.pem","rb") as f: key = RSA.import_key(f.read()) n=key.n e=key.e
with open("flag.txt","rb") as f: c=f.read() c=libnum.s2n(c)
#费马分解, n1=fermat(n) p=n1[0] q=n1[1] phi_n=(p-1)*(q-1) #求逆元 d=libnum.invmod(e,phi_n) m=pow(c,d,n) print(m) print(libnum.n2s(int(m)).decode()) </code></pre> <h4 id="进阶——自动生成密钥及加解密">进阶——自动生成密钥及加解密</h4> <pre class=" language-language-python"><code class="language-language-python">from Crypto.Cipher import PKCS1_v1_5 from Crypto import Random from Crypto.PublicKey import RSA from Crypto.Cipher import PKCS1_OAEP
random_generator = Random.new().read rsa = RSA.generate(2048, random_generator) # 生成私钥 private_key = rsa.exportKey() # print(private_key.decode('utf-8')) with open('rsa_private_key.pem', 'wb')as f: f.write(private_key) # 生成公钥 public_key = rsa.publickey().exportKey() # print(public_key.decode('utf-8')) with open('rsa_public_key.pem', 'wb')as f: f.write(public_key)
#测试用密钥加密 public_key = RSA.importKey(public_key) msg='flag' pk = PKCS1_v1_5.new(public_key) encrypt_text = pk.encrypt(msg.encode()) print(encrypt_text)
#测试密钥解密 private_key = RSA.importKey(private_key) pk = PKCS1_v1_5.new(private_key) msg = pk.decrypt(encrypt_text,0) print(msg)
#两种标准 rsa_components = (n, e, int(d), p, q) arsa = RSA.construct(rsa_components) rsakey = RSA.importKey(arsa.exportKey()) rsakey = PKCS1_OAEP.new(rsakey) decrypted = rsakey.decrypt(c) print(decrypted) </code></pre> <h3 id="共模攻击脚本">共模攻击脚本</h3>
